# Thread: Does mere foot grounding/thermogenesis sustain full body health?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/>
**Subforum:** Cold Thermogenesis
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Glenn A — 2019-01-05T20:38:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-259511>

To paraphrase Jack, "Humans are the only species bright enough to invent foot coverings, and stupid enough to live in them."

So the animal kingdom, from the Arctic to the Tropics is nearly full-time grounded, though primarily via it's feet. And to a large degree, the same creatures in the Arctic and very often in the Temperate zone, experience less than 50 F degrees in the feet.

While it is interesting to know the value full-body cold thermogenesis has on recovery from surgery or injury, I find I'm more interested in what value this mostly foot grounding and cold thermogenesis has on health and longevity.

Is full body cold thermogenesis necessary to accomplish something that mere foot thermogenesis can do effectively if used daily?

It would be nice to discover a study that shows considerable health benefits from mere foot exposure to cold, as I've already found many studies that show that foot grounding is sufficient to restore aspects of health that are lost by complete insulation from the Earth's magnetic field.

Does anyone have a study that shows how humans benefit from continual exposure of just the feet to ground current and temperature? Or conversely, what damage is done to a wild animal by removing these electrical and temperature conditions? I haven't been able to find anything on this yet!

I did however find a study showing that grounding positively alters immune system parameters and reduces sensitivity to pain.

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3265077/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3265077/)

So what if cold thermogenesis had been added as another factor to the test protocol? Would the benefits of grounding have been inreased? Reduced? And what if wild animals had also been tested? Would just foot grounding and cold have had the same immune benefits as those shown by having humans experience supine grounding during sleep (though foot sole grounding was used alone during active hours)?

There seems to be a lot of questions opened up here after Jack's experiments on thermogenesis. I spend time every morning for the last month foot grounded, regardless of sub freezing temperatures. I have nothing but positive resuls, including a body that feels warmer while it's feet are grounded and cold. So now I'm wondering if the quantum mechanics involved in cold-grounding somehow helps an animals body remain actually warmer (as in better circulation, or ATP generation), or is the body warmth just a sensational illusion I'm experiencing.

If it's no illusion, then for the animal kingdom it brings up another question: How much of an animals resistance to the cold is provided by it's fur or feathers, and how much is that resistance augmented by effects of what we consider an "elevated" electron flow but is really a "normal" and "adequate e-flow. Compared to this "normal", grounded state for animals, I'm just thinking that humans are almost always measured in a "low" e-flow condition as they are measured in an ungrounded, warm-footed state. We consider the resultant human measurements "normal", but is it healthy?

### Danco3636 — 2019-01-11T00:25:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-259991>

Each morning I get up I stand in my now cold pool up to my shins.... I stand there facing the sunrise direction and do some controlled breathing, body movement and review my purpose in life...... I usually do this nude and then walk on my grass for a bit with some extra movement, breathing and general positive motivational, (pump me up) thoughts...... Kicks my start for the day AND FEELS AMAZING. Shortly after I usually do a cold plunge and cold outside shower around sunrise or just after......... But the cold feet, air and water really kicks starts everything.

Just my experience.

### Inna — 2019-01-11T01:22:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-260000>

[https://jackkruse.com/quantum-biology-6-bipedalism/](https://jackkruse.com/quantum-biology-6-bipedalism/)

### Glenn A — 2019-01-12T03:34:51+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-260126>

> [Danco3636 said:](/goto/post?id=259991)
>
> Each morning I get up I stand in my now cold pool up to my shins.... I stand there facing the sunrise direction and do some controlled breathing, body movement and review my purpose in life...... I usually do this nude and then walk on my grass for a bit with some extra movement, breathing and general positive motivational, (pump me up) thoughts...... Kicks my start for the day AND FEELS AMAZING. Shortly after I usually do a cold plunge and cold outside shower around sunrise or just after......... But the cold feet, air and water really kicks starts everything.
>
> Just my experience.

Yeah, I agree with the "FEELS AMAZING" and have a similar morning routine, often returning an hour later to catch the sun a bit higher in the sky than on my first grounded encounter.

Do you think you experience less chill in the remainder of your body (than in your feet) from being grounded only via the feet than you would experience if you had done the same exercise while insulated from the earth contact?

### Glenn A — 2019-01-12T03:49:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-260127>

> [Inna said:](/goto/post?id=260000)
>
> [https://jackkruse.com/quantum-biology-6-bipedalism/](https://jackkruse.com/quantum-biology-6-bipedalism/)

Thanks. Great article. Lots of conjecture regarding man's evolution, but interesting about the sweating (and water absorption) uniqueness of man. To me it still leaves open the question of whether man achieves the same benefits from grounding as do 4 footed mammals, or achieves more/less benefit. I'm specifically interested in the subject of cold tolerance. So in the case of man: cold tolerance of poorly clothed (or naked) bodies that are routinely grounded compared to bodies that are not grounded at all.

Jack definitely demonstrates he feels the foot-provided water-cycling is one key to enhanced brain energy and body heat generation. Though there's dozens of holes in the theory of how man got developed this ability, the fact that this is man's condition is not hard to accept, along with the benefits to his survival, trading mobility for brain power.

### recoen — 2019-01-16T19:58:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-260516>

[@Danco3636](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1687/) do you find doing the CT first with only your lower legs has any effect (positive or negative) on your cold adaption when you do your cold plunge and shower later?

### Bob Stirling — 2019-01-16T22:39:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-mere-foot-grounding-thermogenesis-sustain-full-body-health.22810/post-260549>

> [Glenn A said:](/goto/post?id=259511)
>
> To paraphrase Jack, "Humans are the only species bright enough to invent foot coverings, and stupid enough to live in them."
>
> So the animal kingdom, from the Arctic to the Tropics is nearly full-time grounded, though primarily via it's feet. And to a large degree, the same creatures in the Arctic and very often in the Temperate zone, experience less than 50 F degrees in the feet.
>
> <text deleted>
>
> If it's no illusion, then for the animal kingdom it brings up another question: How much of an animals resistance to the cold is provided by it's fur or feathers, and how much is that resistance augmented by effects of what we consider an "elevated" electron flow but is really a "normal" and "adequate e-flow. Compared to this "normal", grounded state for animals, I'm just thinking that humans are almost always measured in a "low" e-flow condition as they are measured in an ungrounded, warm-footed state. We consider the resultant human measurements "normal", but is it healthy?

That's an interesting question! I would say that much of the animals resistance to the cold is maintained by an "adequate normal e-flow". Assuming that, the fur is protecting a naturally "warm" body so doesn't have to do as much work. The undercoat is the soft insulator and the overcoat is a windbreak and seal. Humans can't survive long in those conditions without support.

# Thread: Comments on DDW from somebody who provides it in Taiwan non profit centre
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/comments-on-ddw-from-somebody-who-provides-it-in-taiwan-non-profit-centre.22833/>
**Subforum:** The Epi-Paleo Diet
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Michael CULLEN — 2019-01-07T20:40:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/comments-on-ddw-from-somebody-who-provides-it-in-taiwan-non-profit-centre.22833/post-259674>

Bio from individual
**I'm a project manager working with a small biopharma company in Taiwan.
The biopharma company is in charge of a plant which makes DDW (deuterium depleted water), saturated with hydrogen. The same company is also operating a nonprofit treatment facility to treat CNS related diseases.**

'There is no reason to lower deuterium content to 130 ppm. Mitochondria will do its work to keep the balance of deuterium content. Some % of variation is possible by drinking DDW daily.
One important thing to know: DDW is not effective against CNS diseases, including ME/CFS, when applied as a stand alone treatment---it must be used together with hydrogen inhalation (flow rate 20ml/minute, 20 to 30 minutes per session, 2 to 3 sessions daily, for 30 days or longer).

DDW makers are located in Hungary, Romania, Russia, China and Taiwan.
Only Taiwanese maker has DDW with hydrogen infusion. Patent of invention approved in US.'

'DDW is not effective against:
1) Inflammation
2) strong oxidative stress

It's helpful in changing mito environment to reduce DNA duplication errors.
If you review studies using DDW for cancer treatment you can see life span prolonged.
A full remission is hard to get.

We treat diseases differently since we use our own treatment center to optimize dose and proportion of H2 gas / DDW.

For example, for COPD, DDW is not essential. Because it is a problem of chronic inflammation.
With inhalation of pure H2, the symptoms may be reduced very quickly, in a few weeks. But the effect can be felt almost immediately after first session of inhalation.

H2 and DDW, combined, is not one plus one. The therapeutical efficacy is amplified.
Although there are many studies about the benefits of hydrogen as antioxidant, it's not readily available. Getting H2 from hydrogen water bottles is not new. But most users don´t know how to do it correctly.

To give you an idea, the factory in China I mentioned had sold many units to their clients. The factory put a pressure valve on the adapter to connect nasal tube. It means the inner pressure of the bottle must be higher than certain threshold to let H2 out. No client had actually breathed H2 from those bottles they bought since in 10 or 20 minutes the inner pressure is not high enough to open the valve. I will give you details so you can do it correctly, in case you buy some units for a try'.

from
[https://forums.phoenixrising.me/index.php?threads/deuterium-detrimental-to-mitochondria.56084/page-2](https://forums.phoenixrising.me/index.php?threads/deuterium-detrimental-to-mitochondria.56084/page-2)

Any thoughts?

# Thread: Suntanning the eyeballs.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/suntanning-the-eyeballs.22841/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### ALEXIS TUDOR — 2019-01-08T18:12:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/suntanning-the-eyeballs.22841/post-259761>

So I came across Jacks stuff just as winter was kicking in and unfortunately I have not had optimal situation to tinker with the sun and eyes but wanted to share what I have come across so far. As I was looking at the morning sun I noticed when the sun rose at a certain point it would start to hurt my eyes as it got too bright. Naturally I would not force it and shift my gaze away. I did notice though that I could easily look directly at the sun with my left eye with no discomfort, whereas my right eye would say, "enough, too much light". Thought that was interesting because in chinese medicine the left is associated with the lunar (darker side) energetically and the right is associated with the solar light side. Kind of like yin and yang. Also my left eye vision is worse than my right eye but could take more sunlight.

Now that I don't wear shades, I also notice I squint a lot when it gets bright. Somehow that seems unnatural because it would seem like our eyes were made to cope with sunlight without much stress barring looking straight at it. I wonder if it is because my eyes have not made enough of the appropriate melanopsin since life without shades. Have people found that eventually they don't need to squint at all with the sun is in their face.? Having long periods of cloudy days in Knoxville winter with an occasional full sunny day does not help either. Other than eating a shitload of Sardines and oysters I wonder if there is somehow a way to increase my quantum eyeball tan. I wonder if I can do it artificially.

One last side note. I wonder if there are special sensors in our eyes to pick up moonlight intensities.

### Penny — 2019-01-24T22:18:09+0200

# Thread: Cooking with oysters
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cooking-with-oysters.22846/>
**Subforum:** Epi-Paleo Recipes
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Christine_L — 2019-01-08T23:55:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cooking-with-oysters.22846/post-259796>

Obviously raw is best and easiest to eat! However I bought a few bags of frozen oysters for cold winter days. In searching with the best way to optimize flavor and fat when cooking, I found this very enjoyable looking list of oyster recipes with easily interchangeable ingredients for seasonal eating. Enjoy!

[https://www.saveur.com/article/-/Oyster-Recipes#page-33](https://www.saveur.com/article/-/Oyster-Recipes#page-33)

Specifically...

Baked oysters with bacon and spinach
[https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Saveur-100-2011-Baked-Oysters-with-Bacon-and-Spinach](https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Saveur-100-2011-Baked-Oysters-with-Bacon-and-Spinach)

Oysters with vinegar and prosecco
[https://www.saveur.com/article/recipes/Saveur-100-2011-Highlands-Oyster-Mignonette](https://www.saveur.com/article/recipes/Saveur-100-2011-Highlands-Oyster-Mignonette)

Pork and oyster meatballs! (sans canola oil and other gnarly stuff) I picture this as garlicky meatballs
[https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Pork-Oyster-Meatballs](https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Pork-Oyster-Meatballs)

Seafood cocktail - Spanish style
[https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/vuelve-a-la-vida](https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/vuelve-a-la-vida)

Oyster bacon omelette (sans bread crumbs)
[https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Hangtown-Oyster-Bacon-Omelette](https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Hangtown-Oyster-Bacon-Omelette)

Oyster stew (I made something like this previously and it was very very good!)
[https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Oyster-Stew](https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Oyster-Stew)

Shrimp and oyster Perloo - New Orleans inspired
[https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Shrimp-and-Oyster-Perloo-1000068222](https://www.saveur.com/article/Recipes/Shrimp-and-Oyster-Perloo-1000068222)

### tammybrown — 2021-10-31T00:27:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cooking-with-oysters.22846/post-305582>

Making everyday kitchen chores easier is exactly what life hacks are for.

### tammybrown — 2021-10-31T00:28:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cooking-with-oysters.22846/post-305583>

As you know, food cooked in copper dishes is always more delicious and fragrant, thanks to the special properties of copper. Copper heats up quickly and evenly, due to which the dish acquires a special refined taste. It is for these properties that cooks prefer copper dishes in good expensive restaurants. But copper has the property of reacting with acidic environments, so all copper dishes intended for cooking are covered with tin inside to protect against direct contact with copper. For example, I like not only copper dishes, but also cooking with gloves. I think this is very important not only in cafes and restaurants. I chose gloves from medrux and I can advise them to you. If you are wondering where I bought my copper dishes, then let me know.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
[https://medrux.com/nitrile-gloves-food-safe/](https://medrux.com/nitrile-gloves-food-safe/)

### Gregory Lindsay — 2019-01-14T23:34:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/light-strategies-red-ira-and-uv.22889/post-260330>

Hi everyone, I'm looking for suggestions on light strategies to help get through the winter (I live in Canada, and it's also rainy season).

In particular, I'm looking for suggestions on UV bulbs or light devices that provide UV, and when and how long they should be used (there's very little UV in Canada at this time of year).

Currently, I try to do the following:

Watch the sunrise, at least 15 to 30 minutes, more on less busy days. Get outside at noon to get some solar noon sun and watch the sunset. In addition, I use the Joovv (660nm and 850nm) after watching the sunrise and just after watching the sunset (full body). I also use the Vielight (on my head) at night (810 nm, pulsed), with an internasal device.

Would like to add some UV, but not sure on best options. Also, open to any suggestions on the above practices.

Thanks!
Greg

# Thread: Electric Pylons
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### davestimes — 2019-01-15T17:09:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/post-260387>

Hey all!

I hope you are all living your best life! Keep grounded!

I have a problem and would like to ask for some advise. The company I work for is moving offices and guess what's just outside, a massive pylon.... like really big!
I know some of the implications of working next this but I'm struggling to find the correct information quick enough so basically just looking for some really good studies/papers or a good documentary you may of come across recently. This is so that I can arm myself with good up-to-date data and science to oppose this move.

Many thanks in advance
Davestimes

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-01-15T18:26:15+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/post-260400>

Dave,

Those high tension transmission lines carry huge amounts of AC electricity with accompanying large ELF EMF fields. How much of this you are exposed to depends on the distance from lines to your new office (remember the EMF inverse law). ELF exposure is linked to many deleterious effects, including cancer. Building biology specialists have determined what are safe and unsafe radiation level exposures.

You really won't know your potential danger until you get some reliable metrics from a meter that measures these electromagnetic fields.

Nonetheless, if your workplace is quite a ways from these electric lines chances are you not in great danger. Measure and then evaluate.

### davestimes — 2019-01-16T19:25:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/post-260515>

Hi ElectricUniverse

Thanks for your reply!
The distance is really close, approx. 30m /90 ft. literally across the road!
Like you say I will have to measure, but I will need to get an EMF meter or someone in Ireland (Dublin) to help.
Also found out today that we have no windows!!! this is going bad to worse

Many thanks again
Davestimes

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-01-17T18:24:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/post-260626>

Best wishes to you on securing a safe environment.

Consumer grade ELF EMF meters are really not that expensive. You also may have the option to rent one or hire an EMF mitigation specialist to measure your exposure.

### drezy — 2019-01-17T21:56:45+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/post-260641>

FWIW any US members that lack a meter I'm willing to ship a cornet 88T one way and he member pay the shipping cost back.

Sorry [@davestimes](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21966/) , this is likely of no use to you in Ireland. Im pretty sure the US has not annexed Ireland yet...

### davestimes — 2020-06-03T19:36:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/electric-pylons.22897/post-289997>

Hello
Hope you are all keeping well, and thank for the replies.

I just thought I would give an update, I pushed the right buttons to get a survey completed, but they would only give me the summary report (below). Safe probably not but not as bad as I thought, what do you think?

Hi David,

Please find below the Executive Summary for the survey carried out by CMSE Consultancy.

“3. Executive Summary

The EMF survey involved measuring Magnetic Flux Density and Electrical field strength emitted from the 110kV overhead power cables, running at an approximate height of 7 meters, adjacent to the new office area on Park West Road.

The AARONIA AG Spectran NF-5035S EMF meter was used to measure and record the electromagnetic radiation levels. The readings were taken:

1.  Externally at the pylon, under the power cables, on the footpath outside to the south of the building, in the staff car park to the east side of the building, along the perimeter to the east, south and west of the building including the servicing area.
2.  Internally along the perimeter to the east, south and west of the building within 1 meter of the external wall.

The readings were compared with action values and guidelines from the ICNIRP with suitable safety factors as outlined in section 7.2. These giving a conservative indication of possible exposure issues. The details of which were tabulated and presented in Section 8 of the report.

Requirements for specific EMF surveys in respect of common work activities, equipment and workplaces are shown in section 7.7 table 3. The detail of which may require further additional surveys to be carried out.

The reference exposure levels specified in the ICNIRP guidance for power levels of 50Hz are shown below:

-   Reference exposure levels for members of the public to magnetic fields: 200 uT2
-   Reference exposure levels for members of the public to electrical fields: 5000V/m2 Ref2.: ICNIRP Fact Sheet on exposures to lower frequency time varying magnetic and electrical fields

An additional safety factor of 0.5 (50%) respectively was applied for the evaluation of exposures in this report. i.e. 100 uT2 and 2500V/m2. A further additional safety factor of 0.5 (50%) to determine the requirement for corrective action to be taken. The measurement under the pylon gave the highest reading for Magnet Flux Density of 1.65uT or 1.65 % of the 50uT level specified. The Electric Field Strength at the same location was 782.5 Vm-1 or 62.6 % of the 1250V/m level specified. The public footpath (near the east corner of the building) gave the highest reading for Electric Field Strength of 832 V/m-1 or 66.56 % of the 1250V/m level specified. A Magnet Flux Density of 1.14µT or 1.14 % of the 50uT level specified was measured at this location. Internally, the corridor between offices gave the highest reading for Magnet Flux Density of 1.09uT or 1.09 % of the 50uT level specified. However, this reading was recorded directly in line with the electrical supplies room. It is assumed that the increased Magnet Flux Density reading was due to this. The Electric Field Strength at the same location was 7.4 Vm-1 or 0.6% of the 1250V/m level specified. The highest reading for Electric Field Strength internally was 16.4 V/m-1 or 1.3% of the 1250V/m level specified. A Magnet Flux Density of 0.6µT or % of the 50uT level specified was measured at this location. All readings taken were well within the ICNIRP guidance for EMF exposure levels for Employees. Employees at particular risk, as described in Section 7, should seek advice from their Doctor if they are concerned about EMF levels affecting medical devices.”

# Thread: Red and Infared light and eye protection
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/red-and-infared-light-and-eye-protection.22898/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Karlosis — 2019-01-15T19:05:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/red-and-infared-light-and-eye-protection.22898/post-260409>

I feel like I heard Jack mention in a podcast that NIR light can cause cataracts.

I have recently purchased the following lights and have started playing with them. I am wondering if I should not point lights at my face or if I should wear NIR protection glasses or sun tanning goggles? I feel like there is a lot of contradicting information out there on this topic. Some say its good for the eyes others say it causes permanent damage.

**ThermaBulb NIR-A 250 watt**
_([https://www.therabulb.com/products/therabulb-infrared-bulb-nir-a-near-infrared-bulb-250-watt](https://www.therabulb.com/products/therabulb-infrared-bulb-nir-a-near-infrared-bulb-250-watt))_

**SGROW 24W Red Led Light Red 660nm and Near Infrared 850nm**
_([https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B07JW9RZ7K](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B07JW9RZ7K))_

I really only intend to use these until the sun comes back out here in ohio and on small injuries from triathlon training and races.

much love

### Karlosis — 2019-01-24T19:25:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/red-and-infared-light-and-eye-protection.22898/post-261252>

For example: here is information from two websites that sell these lights that I mentioned above:

**RubyLux**: "One disadvantage of near infrared light is that excessive exposure to infrared light can contribute to the formation of cataracts. This is one reason wearing appropriate eye protection is so important."
_Source: [https://rubyluxlights.com/collectio...y/products/rubylux-near-infrared-bulb-grade-a](https://rubyluxlights.com/collections/light-therapy-bulbs-us-canada-only/products/rubylux-near-infrared-bulb-grade-a)_

**LED via redlightman**: "Half of the light coming from this device is infrared, meaning it is beyond human eye perception. Only cameras without infrared filters can detect this light, and it poses no risk to our eyes."
_Source: [https://redlightman.com/product/red-infrared-combo-mini/](https://redlightman.com/product/red-infrared-combo-mini/)
_

### Karlosis — 2019-01-29T03:02:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/red-and-infared-light-and-eye-protection.22898/post-261662>

I just did a slow motion video test via my iphone on the SGROW 660/850 light and it didnt flicker. I was expecting it to flicker. Pretty happy to find that out. Just thought I would share this info.

# Thread: Turning off breakers at night
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/turning-off-breakers-at-night.22907/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Awainer1 — 2019-01-16T21:41:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/turning-off-breakers-at-night.22907/post-260533>

Have a new N=1 finding lately. I never turned off the breakers in my house because I live with my parents and I tested for magnetic and wireless emf signals and came up clear. Since they're away for the winter Ive been killing the breakers and sleeping the best I have in probably my whole life. I thought I was sleeping through the night before but now I realize that I wasnt. Looks like I'm going to have to find a good outside place to sleep when they get back this summer.

### Katie Durham — 2019-01-16T22:28:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/turning-off-breakers-at-night.22907/post-260548>

Did you check whether turning off one breaker for your bedroom affects other stuff you would need to leave on when they're there too? Maybe you still could do that.

Did you check all four fields - electric, magnetic, RF/microwave, and dirty electricity? The room may not be so clean, or something in an abutting room or floor. Replacing corded items (like lamps, clocks or radios) with battery-operated. Moving power cards farther away from you. Removing all electronics like TVs.

Sleeping outside in the summer could be awesome, but you might have more options inside than you think. Having experienced much better sleep let's you know what is possible. You have time to work something out.

### Awainer1 — 2019-01-16T23:56:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/turning-off-breakers-at-night.22907/post-260558>

ya I probably can turn some of the breakers back on when I have to but right now theres no need.

I checked all the fields with a trimeter and also the rf/microwave with an acousticom meter. Theres nothing else plugged in in the room.

### Katie Durham — 2019-01-17T00:01:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/turning-off-breakers-at-night.22907/post-260559>

That doesn't tell you about levels of dirty electricity. That requires something like a Stetson meter. It measures GS (Graham Stetson) units. It's in the wiring in the walls, which continues to have electrical pressure even if nothing is turned on. It's why I pulled my bed away from the wall even with nothing plugged in near my bed.

You have many months to play with the possibilities, like which breakers you really need turned off.

### Jenny S — 2019-01-17T02:16:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/turning-off-breakers-at-night.22907/post-260571>

> [Katie Durham said:](/goto/post?id=260559)
>
> That doesn't tell you about levels of dirty electricity. That requires something like a Stetson meter. It measures GS (Graham Stetson) units. It's in the wiring in the walls, which continues to have electrical pressure even if nothing is turned on. It's why I pulled my bed away from the way even with nothing plugged in near my bed.
>
> You have many months to play with the possibilities, like which breakers you really need turned off.

Yes agreed - after buying stetson meter levels at our old house were unbelievable high

# Thread: Seeking support and teamwork here in Yucatan to help other mitos experience Yucatan quantum time!
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-support-and-teamwork-here-in-yucatan-to-help-other-mitos-experience-yucatan-quantum-time.22911/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Gina R — 2019-01-17T18:04:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-support-and-teamwork-here-in-yucatan-to-help-other-mitos-experience-yucatan-quantum-time.22911/post-260621>

Hello!

I'm looking to be in teamwork (somewhat quickly) with someone to help others experience the quantum health benefits in the Yucatan. I am here now in Puerto Aventuras (about 15-20 minutes south of Playa Del Carmen). I've been here for about 5 weeks, working on my own health recovery and getting to know Puerto Aventuras. It's a great spot to be here in the Yucatan. Puerto Aventuras is a private marina community and I prefer this by far, to the busy/hectic areas of Playa Del Carmen. It's a lovely environment for healing, health recovery time and for recharges.

I'm looking to stay for February and more after that. I want to continue to be in a place where I can rent out a room where I am to fellow mitos, biohackers, those on their health journey with a mito-friendly environment. I have done that for January and in that time, I hosted 3 wonderful like-minded folks with them renting out my 2nd bedroom. I know what it's like to research and try to figure out all the logistics of coming here (I personally did that and it was exhausting to say the least!). So, I'm able to help others by having done a lot of ground work in finding a place, hacking the light, the internet, etc. I want to continue doing that to help others and also keep afloat here so I can continue to be here for my own health recovery.

I've been looking for my next place for February and beyond, here in Puerto Aventuras but with my financial constraints (due to my health issues and journey), it's been tough to find a place to rent in the right area of Puerto Aventuras (away from a particular cell tower and very close to the beach for optimal sun time and so there's less stress and less travel time in getting to the beach). I also seek a place that has the ability for some nude sun bathing and lots of outdoor space. I've been here for a bit of time so I've gotten to know about the more ideal locations (quiet atmosphere away from the restaurants/bars, locations on the beach, etc) and also resources for the area. I'm still learning and discovering more and more.

Basically, I'm curious if there's anyone out there who is interested in supporting something like what I'm describing, to help other mitos. Perhaps you can't physically be in the Yucatan right now, but I'm physically here. I could be the one to facilitate in-person, but I just don't have the upfront rent $ for the ideal places for a non-vacation rental time frame. The extra bedroom/bedrooms could be rented out to others. This doesn't need to be anything extremely formal nor fancy to start out with but there are many directions that it could go! Even starting off with a 2 or 3 bedroom villa rental on the beach or right near the beach could be amazing.

I'm very passionate about helping others to optimal health and I'm a health practitioner as well! I'd love to connect with anyone that would be interested in talking about the possibility. Honestly, I'm on a small time constraint with figuring out where I'm going to be starting February but I'm sure there's some way that it could work!

Please reach out to me here, send me a message here or email me (ginarieg) at gmail and let's chat about it! (My gmail email will get to me faster.)

Here are some pictures of the beautiful area here. There are wonderful sunrises, sunsets and lots of full-day sun. I am also very close to several cenotes too

# Thread: Scientists for Wired Tech
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scientists-for-wired-tech.22925/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Scompy — 2019-01-19T04:53:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scientists-for-wired-tech.22925/post-260753>

**"Deaths . . .**
**Deceased 1 — lived about 260 ft. from the Cell Tower, from 2009 until her death in 2010**
She was in her mid-forties and moved into PAH shortly after receiving a diagnosis of breast cancer. During the one year she lived here, she grew progressively worse until she needed special care and had to leave. She died shortly afterwards off-site.

**Deceased 2 — lived about 260 ft. from the Cell Tower, from 2009 until his death in 2011**
He was in his 60’s and had heart issues. He was found unconscious in his apartment. He died shortly afterwards off-site.

**Deceased 3 — lived about 275 ft. from the Cell Tower, from 2009 until her death in 2015**
She was in her 60’s when she moved in. She had osteoporosis that progressed to such a point she experienced continual excruciating pain and loss of full mobility. She died in her apartment.

**Deceased 4 — lived about 275 ft. from the Cell Tower, from 2009 until his death in 2013**
He was in his 60’s and had diabetes which progressed to the point where he became wheel chair bound. Eventually he had one leg then the other leg amputated. He died in the apartment.

**Deceased 5 — lived about 350 ft. from the Cell Tower, from 2009 until her death in 2013**
She was in her 20’s when she moved here and was healthy. She was diagnosed with breast cancer shortly after the birth of her child around 2011. She died at age 33 and left a 2 ½ year old son. She died in her apartment.

...

**Current Illnesses . . .**
**Resident 1 — has lived about 260 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her 50’s, first lived on the first floor close to the room that contains the three-story building’s bank of 48 “Smart Meters” for about two years. She then moved to the second floor unit closest to the cell tower. She suffers from severe migraines and vertigo.

**Resident 2 — has lived about 275 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her 80’s, developed heart issues after living five years in the third floor unit closest to the cell tower. She has electrical problems with her heart, just had her third surgical ablation and was recently in the ICU after coding.

**Resident 3 — has lived about 300 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her 70’s, lives on the second floor and is experiencing headaches, dizziness, fatigue, memory fog, inability to sleep through the night and bone/cartilage problems.

**Resident 4 — has lived about 325 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She in her 40’s, lives on the first floor and has developed breast cancer since living there.

**Resident 5 — has lived about 350 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2013**
She is in her 70’s and lives on the second floor and has horrible sleep problems, cartilage/bone issues and experiences memory loss.

**Resident 6 — has lived about 360 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her 30’s and her family first lived in another building for two years and then moved to her present location, which is in direct line with the cell tower. She has been experiencing severe stomach disorder that was first diagnosed as cancer, has a lump near her breast – which is being monitored, has sleep issues, headaches and extreme fatigue. Her 8-year old has morning headaches and tinnitus. Her husband has headaches after 15 minutes and needs to leave their upstairs bedroom.

**Resident 7 — has lived about 450 ft. and then 350 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her 50’s and first lived on the second floor near the room that contains the three-story building’s bank of 48 “Smart Meters,” for about three years. Then she moved to the first floor closer to the cell tower. Since living here, she has developed a condition that has rendered her thyroid to no longer function. She is the mother of Resident 8.

**Resident 8 — has lived about 450 ft. and then 550 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is now in her 20’s, moved into the second-floor unit with her mother at age 15 and lived there for four years. While at that apartment she had a cyst removed from her ovary at age 16. Also, while living there, she became pregnant and gave birth to her son. Her son coded three times after his birth and has had three surgeries for breathing issues. In 2013, she moved to another building. In February 2018, she had ovarian cancer surgery which removed a 15-pound tumor from her ovary at age 25.

**Resident 9 — has lived about 450 ft. from the Cell Tower since 2010**
She lives on the third floor. Her daughter is in her 20’s and has experienced debilitating fatigue after living here for four years.\\

**Resident 10 — has lived about 675 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 2012**
Her son, now mid-teens, has developed bouts of dizziness, severe headaches, fatigue, stomach aches and anxiety since living here.

**Resident 11 — has lived about 700 ft.. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her early 60’s and has been diagnosed with breast cancer since living here. She is experiencing on-going episodes of vertigo, migraines and tinnitus. Her daughter, now in her 20’s, has been experiencing headaches and fatigue.

**Resident 12 — has lived about 725 ft.. from the Cell Tower, since 2009**
She is in her 50’s and has had two skin cancer surgeries. Her daughter, now early teens, has been diagnosed with Hashimoto’s disease.

**Neighbors — have lived in a house about 475 ft. from the Cell Tower, since 1988**
The woman told us the cell tower was built about 15 years ago and has been upgraded several times since then. She is in her 70’s, has Alzheimer’s and is losing her sight. Her husband, also in his 70’s has severe dementia."

[http://scientists4wiredtech.com/seb...iE-IrnqL4rtQ4wLzoqbygZlIZqHabPwBxlEheWItTjrA8](http://scientists4wiredtech.com/sebastopol/?fbclid=IwAR1cxNijs8wl1liE-IrnqL4rtQ4wLzoqbygZlIZqHabPwBxlEheWItTjrA8)

# Thread: Boric Acid intake in mice activates UPC-2
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/boric-acid-intake-in-mice-activates-upc-2.22936/>
**Subforum:** Redox Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Valerie — 2019-01-21T03:35:22+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/boric-acid-intake-in-mice-activates-upc-2.22936/post-260900>

**So if boric acid activates UPC-2 is this a way to deplete deuterium out of the mitrochondrial cells? Maybe this is a cheaper approach than DDW.**

Objective.The effect of oral boric acid intake on reducing body weight has been previously demonstrated although the mechanism has been unclear.This research study reveals the mechanism.

Subjects. Twelve mice were used, in groups of six each in the control and study groups. For five days, control group mice drank standard tap water while during the same time period the study group mice drank tapwaterwhich contains 0.28mg/250mL boric acid.After a 5-day period, gene expression levels for uncoupling proteins (UCPs) in the white adipose tissue (WAT), brown adipose tissue (BAT), and skeletal muscle tissue (SMT) and total body weight changes were analyzed.

Results. Real time PCR analysis revealed no significant change in UCP3 expressions, but UCP2 inWAT  0.0317), BAT  0.014), and SMT  0.0159) and UCP1 in BAT  0.026) were overexpressed in the boric acid group. In addition, mice in the boric acid group lost body weight (mean 28.1%) while mice in the control group experienced no weight loss but a slight weight gain (mean 0.09%, < 0.001).

Conclusion. Oral boric acid intake causes overexpression of thermogenic proteins in the
adipose and skeletalmuscle tissues. Increasing thermogenesis through UCP protein pathway results in the accelerated lipolysis and body weight loss.
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/23861682](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/23861682)


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

### Penny — 2019-01-21T20:59:24+0200

**MICROBIOME QUORUM LIGHT SENSING AND UV LIGHT**

The last key link with light is with HDAC inhibitors present in the gut: BUTYRATE ketones are not the only common metabolite with HDAC inhibiting properties, but so are sirtuins and butyrate in the gut. Sirtuins are very important signaling components in this quantum dance, especially in the gut and within the eye’s clock mechanism. **Free radicals cannot be made in the absence of oxygen and this points out why butyrate production from short-chain carbohydrates in the gut is required in these cases**. Butyrate production is lost in many cancerous states, especially in the colon. It would be an ideal strategy to switch between these natural light prescriptions as a dietary form of therapy as time evolves in an illness state. **The key teaching point most in medicine and ancestral health miss is that our microbiome can’t make butyrate when nitrogen cycling is uncoupled from sunlight for any reason.** The other point they both miss is that the microbiome is made up of bacteria. _Bacteria are easily destroyed by any amount of UV light._ Remember all disease states are associated with a simplified less diverse flora. Illnesses release more UV light from eukaryotic cells in the gut. Eukaryotic cells are immense compared to bacterial cells in size. This was a key point in Lane’s ” The Vital Question”. The impact of excessive UV light release from our cells on bacteria will affect the species of bacteria in the microbiome differently. Bacteria have another issue that photosensitizes them to UV light. They contain substantial amounts of photo-sensitive amino acids compared to our cells. _They have a lot of phenylalanine and tyrosine and those two amino acids are relatively rare in eukaryotic cell proteins by design._ The reason for the bactericidal effect of UV light upon them is because they absorb greater amounts of UV light from cells that are emitting more of this light. _The UV light causes a coagulation of the bacterial colonies and destroys the biofilms that allow them to adhere to surfaces._ Since our eukaryotic cells do not have a lot of these amino acids that absorb UV light the bacteria are preferentially destroyed. Eukaryotic enterocytes cells release more ELF-UV when their redox potential is lowered for any reason. In all disease states, eukaryotic cells release more UV light than they do in wellness states. This is why all disease states are associated with a less diverse flora in species and number. The excess ELF-UV from our cells destroys the microbiome. **Bacteria have 5 times the amount of these two amino acids of eukaryotic cells.** It is a light effect, not a food effect. This shows you why replacing bacteria in the gut with probiotics fecal transplants fundamentally acutely works. If you do not improve the redox potential of cells by improving your environment your cells will continue to leak excessive amounts of ELF-UV and the probiotics and/or fecal transplant effects will be short-lived. If you want to keep wasting your money with the “ancestral guru’s precepts” in their clinics to treat your gut disorders, by all means, do so. They know nothing about photochemistry and will keep selling you their precepts, opinions, and bullshit ideas.

Therefore, are the functional med docs right that you need Ox bile and lipase without a gallbladder?

I drink chicory and eat bitter greens for bile stimulation.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/do-you-need-ox-bile-or-lipase-capsules-with-no-gallbladder.22945/post-260976>

Fortunately I have an intact gall bladder that I love very much and want to keep happy. Gallbladder removal surgery (cholecystectomy) is now the number one abdominal surgery in USA.

I have noticed oily stools in past so I started a regimen of ox bile supplementation with meals. I think it has helped but it is hard to quantify this kind of body function improvement.

You may have heard of coffee enemas and their beneficial effect on liver detox. They are said to stimulate bile squirting into intestines to keep keep gall bladder emptied of sludge and toxins. Some people swear by lemon juice/olive oil to jump start liver/gall bladder cleansing too.

I take bitters too in hot tea form, including fennel, milk thistle, peppermint, and dandelion root/leaf. Other cholegogues I use are ginger, turmeric, and cinnamon.

Hi All,
I'm new to this so please excuse my mistakes. I'm an IT guy and have thought about ways to reduce Blue light expose.
My first suggestion is to use a Kindle that is not back-lit, so it doesnt have an LEDs to display the text but use liquid crystal to have areas of black and white. This means there is no blue light or any light emitted and can be read as I do sitting with a low-watt incandescent light above my shoulder on the couch. We can still buy incandescent bulbs (for stoves and fridges) in Australia. Whatever I want to read, I convert to PDF and load it on my kindle for evening reading. Does this sound reasonable. Thanks for your comments. Peter in Oz.

The additional incandescent over your shoulder "supplements "with the normal colours of day but messes with your clocks even more. In my measurements any red light more than 15W shining on you crosses the threshold of melatonin inhibition. Also you do not want any lights above your head as this is interpreted as sun up.
The MP3 reader is good but use blue blockers even with that small screen.

# Thread: Premature senescence activation in DLD-1 colorectal cancer cells through adjuvant therapy to induce
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/premature-senescence-activation-in-dld-1-colorectal-cancer-cells-through-adjuvant-therapy-to-induce.22970/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Penny — 2019-01-24T21:59:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/premature-senescence-activation-in-dld-1-colorectal-cancer-cells-through-adjuvant-therapy-to-induce.22970/post-261265>

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6090263/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6090263/)

**Abstract**
Cancer, and particularly colon cancer, is associated with an increasing number of cases resistant to chemotherapy. One approach to overcome this, and to improve the prognosis and outcome of patients, is the use of adjuvant therapy alongside the standard chemotherapy regiment. In the present study, the effect of deuterium-depleted water (DDW) as a potential modulator of adjuvant therapy on DLD-1 colorectal cancer models was assessed. A number of functionality assays were performed, including MTT, apoptosis and autophagy, and mitochondrial activity and senescence assays, in addition to assessing the capacity to modify the pattern of released miRNA via microarray technology. No significant effect on cell viability was identified, but an increase in mitochondrial activity and a weak pro-apoptotic effect were observed in the treated DLD-1 cells cultured in DDW-prepared medium compared with those grown in standard conditions (SC). Furthermore, the findings revealed the capacity of DDW medium to promote senescence to a higher degree compared with SC. The exosome-released miRNA pattern was significantly modified for the cells maintained in DDW compared with those maintained in SC. These findings suggest that DDW may serve as an adjuvant treatment; however, a better understanding of the underlying molecular mechanism of action will be useful for developing novel and efficient therapeutic strategies, in which the transcriptomic pattern serves an important role.

# Thread: How I reduced the EMFs in my Home and Work environments
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-i-reduced-the-emfs-in-my-home-and-work-environments.22973/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 15
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Peter Schmidt — 2019-01-25T00:55:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-i-reduced-the-emfs-in-my-home-and-work-environments.22973/post-261287>

Hi All
\# Please excuse my long list.
Last year I found out that I had developed Graves Hyperthyroidism where my body runs faster than normal in its processess. Since then I have been trying to find the causes. One main cause has been my exposure to Electromagnetic Fields, EMFs at work since I am an IT Manager and have used mobile/DECT phones for the last 25-30 years. Since I discovered this I have been changing my home and work environments ("you cant get better in the same environment that made you sick",Jack Kruse).
Hence I have the following suggestions as what has worked for me, since I am constantly testing withmy Cornet ED88Tplus meter measuring RF, Magnet and Electric fields:
1\. Move all the PC HDs/Laptop away from your work space. Use a monitor with the AC adapter separate move all AC adapters as far away as possible out of your "safer space".
2\. If you need to use a laptop, use a wired keyboard and mouse and monitor, to keep the laptop away
3\. Turn off Bluetooth, Wifi, 3/4G on your PC and laptop. Use ethernet cable to plug into the Router that is as far away in your work/house as possible from working, sleeping and living areas.
4\. Mobile phones - keep in shielded (one side open) case (eg.[www.defendershield.com](http://www.defendershield.com)). Answer only in Speaker mode at a distance. SMS with phone away from you on a table. Turn off always the Bluetooth and Data and Wifi (that turn themselves on sometimes). I changed phone settings from 4G to 3G without issues.
5\. Avoid Wifi if possible - I turned off some Wifi Access points at work and repositioned others away from people (10ft+). I turned off the DECT conference call system, people turn it on when needed.
6\. I positioned all extension cords with chargers and adapters as far as possible from my "safer space"
7\. I took all printers (lazer and inkjet) out of my office (toxic gases and EMFs) and onto the Ethernet cables with all Wifi turned off.
8\. At work I check my office with the Stetzer meter and found it >1000. Putting in two Stetzer dirty AC filters in my office its reduced to 120 (still not 0, the ideal) [www.stetzerelectric.com](http://www.stetzerelectric.com)
9\. At home I reversed the electric blanket which I only plug in when my wife "needs" to warm the bed before we go to bed (unplugged when in bed). Took all lights and DVD player from bedside tables. We use incandescent (15W,fridge globe) light on side table for light at night. We turn off two circuits after we go to bed each night (stop AC waves going 5+ft into room each cycle)
10\. Checked with meters our lounge and bedroom (AC,RF,Electic & Magnet) and took out all extension cords from the safer areas (lounge & bed) keeping them in the areas we avoid unless charging/TV..
11\. Kitchen - we leave all appliances unplugged and put Microwave(my wife needs) in laundry away from people If using mixers/blenders, we "pulse" from AC wall switch not with hand on the unit (high magnetic).
12\. Bathroom - no electric toothbrushes. I've even changed my hair so I dont use the hair dryer anymore (high magnetic)
13\. Got rid of our DECT cordless phones - just a corded phone. Visitors know to turn off their phones Wifi & Data so they can still get calls & SMSs) when visiting.
14\. I tend to avoid crowded areas (high mobile data use) eg.waiting at the airport.
15\. Took all bluetooth out of my car. Turn my mobile to Aeroplane mode when driving (stonger signals at higher speeds). I use an airtube headset if I need to make a call. Use only Tom Tom device or my phone app (maps are downloaded) when navigating.
I see my dis-ease as a warning sign that if I dont change I could get Electromagnetic Hyper Sensitivity EHS
which would mean giving up work, moving away from all electomagnetic fields...- almost impossible.

### John Saf — 2019-01-26T22:53:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-i-reduced-the-emfs-in-my-home-and-work-environments.22973/post-261498>

Great list! I have no problems, just want my my fammily to be safe where they spend the most time.
Here is my favorites how i lowered /removed the nnEmf in my house:
1.dont bring the phones in to the house.
We leave them in the hall in a homemade directional shielding box. Only speakerphone if somebody calls.
2\. No Wi-Fi (ethernet for computer)
3\. Removed the wiring to the underfloor heaters and removed the wall mounted heaters. Innstalled new wood owens with glass.
4\. Hacked my smartmeter antenna, and moved the antenna to a tree 50 meters in the wood next to my house (smb to smb) (kamstrup meters can be drilled to find the antenna port for new external). Shielded antenna so it is directional.
5\. Paying my neighbours mobile so he have unlimited mobile data and dont need to have a wifi. I detected his wifi in my house prior to this.
6\. Hacked my neighbours smartmeter and moved the antenna to the outside of his garage (smb to smb). I did not get a reading, but it is now not near my house.
7\. Moving the bedrooms to the basement of our house (concrete fundament walls) and taking the wires out of the rooms. AAApowered 1w deep red leds and candles for lighting.
8\. Kill switches on all remaning AC currents in the house, and some have been re wired so they are not near where we move.

The house is emf good, only weak cellphone signal in living room/main floor. Working on how to eliminate it. And it has a metal roof.
this is a small village 2700pepole in 1400m2 but the kids get a ipad from first grade. So when my kids start in school, we are moving to a small farm in the next Municipality where they dont have a smart school.

### drezy — 2019-01-26T23:13:37+0200

>
> 4\. Hacked my smartmeter antenna, and moved the antenna to a tree 50 meters in the wood next to my house (smb to smb) (kamstrup meters can be drilled to find the antenna port for new external). Shielded antenna so it is directional.
> 6\. Hacked my neighbours smartmeter and moved the antenna to the outside of his garage (smb to smb). I did not get a reading, but it is now not near my house.

John you had me clapping on item 4 & 6!

That's very very clever and creative. Bravo!

You should be prepared to answer other's questions about this if they are paying attention.

### recoen — 2019-01-27T01:42:22+0200

### Peter Schmidt — 2019-01-29T07:51:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-i-reduced-the-emfs-in-my-home-and-work-environments.22973/post-261701>

Hi All
Thanks for your responses.
Find attached a hand out that I have given staff at work to encourage them to consider safer ways of using their phones..... Feel free to send it on to others - the more we let all our friends and family know, the safer we will be when they visit, eg. having the Wifi, Bluetooth and Data off on their mobiles.
Most of the references on it point to Nicolas Pineault's book -
**The Non-Tinfoil Guide to EMFs: How to Fix Our Stupid Use of Technology**
[https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1976109124/ref=dbs\_a\_def\_rwt\_bibl\_vppi\_i0](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1976109124/ref=dbs_a_def_rwt_bibl_vppi_i0)

where he has done a great job of summarising for ordinary people the effects of EMFs
I have leant my copy to a number of staff who were interested to know more.

Thanks
Peter

### John Saf — 2019-01-29T15:49:23+0200

It looks like norway have a different kind of smartmeters compared to US. But i will put together a DIY post soon .In norway If you do a lot paper work and have a doctor sign sm papers for you, it is sometimes possible to make the powercompany program the smartmeter to deactivate the sender. When i did the "hack" this was not a option, and i did not want to wait one extra day to have the RF removed from my house.

I tryed to contact kamstrup: No information recived
Tryed to contact the power company: Just got a lot of shitty email about how safe the smartmeter is.
So contacted a man working for the powercompany installing smartmeters. He showed me some smartmeters new in the box, and gave me the info i needed. I took some pictures and messured a littlebit so knew where to drill without breaking the meter or seals to find the anenna port.

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-01-29T22:21:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-i-reduced-the-emfs-in-my-home-and-work-environments.22973/post-261750>

Well done John Saf.

Like others I wonder too how you got away with 'highjacking' your utility's smart meter equipment in a serious way (that may catch up with you at some point). Does your locality have an opt-out policy to allow customers to use analog meters instead of smart meters (you mentioned the need for a doctor's permission for non-wireless meters but I didn't understand what that means)?

I am always more convinced by EMF exposure metrics than by anecdotal descriptions of DIY EMF mitigation efforts. Wireless antennas sneak up on us in an insidious way, and I am not just talking about new 5G networks. Unless you are living hermit-like in a far remote fjord or such it would be hard to avoid electrosmog- it is just about any place people are found living in close proximity to each other.

Since we have to rely on electric grid for electrical service (and solar power using inverters-- but that's another story) we need to be mindful of dirty electricity (generated by our own house and even neighbors) and AC electric (body voltage) levels. Also, hidden household wiring errors can increase EMF exposures.

Also, hidden household wiring errors can increase EMF exposures.

Sorry, my written english is poor, so the meaning is not clearly understandable. It will not catch up with me, beacuse im only moving the antenna. Not breaking any seal tags, or beeing near any parts so i can "steal" power from the company. Forced smartmeter installation in norway is a hot topic, so moving the antenna , and not going crazy at the power company is a polite way of doing it. But i dont se any problems sending a email telling them what you have done with pictures.

Because of alot of pepole are unhappy with the forced smartmeter installation in norway. There are some pepole doing a great job for the public. There have been a "crowd funding" so a lawer company have made a legal investigation, resulting in this paper (free download ) Norwegian: [https://einarflydal.com/nedlastinger/](https://einarflydal.com/nedlastinger/)
Concluding with the forced installation is illegal, finding the goverments emf safety levels is BS and a lot more. So it is a powerfull tool for single pepole refusing smartmeter installation or removal.
This have resultet in templates to start the removal process. before the legal investigation you needed a paper from your doctor, but now you can do it without a doktor.
Some pepole get the old analog meter back, and somebody get a reprogramming of the smartmeter so in does not send any signals.

I always thought Nordic countries were much more health and safety conscious than USA but it appears I was wrong.

I wanted to know if kids can eat oysters? I was about to feed my 4 year old oysters the other day and my husband said that in Italy they don't recommend giving oysters to kids.... but i wanted to check here because i think it would be a great food for my daughter.. Thanks!

### Lindsay Alfieri — 2019-02-02T17:51:19+0200

# Thread: Software to reduce WIFI exposure
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/software-to-reduce-wifi-exposure.23001/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 14
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### mbhemming — 2019-01-28T17:39:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/software-to-reduce-wifi-exposure.23001/post-261592>

I have been working on software to reduce WIFI exposure. What Flux/Iris does for blue light, I want this software to do for WIFI. I have a working prototype on my computer and will need a week or two to get a version for people to test.

The purpose of this forum is to connect with people who:

1) Want to test the software

2) Want to help out with the project

What is involved in testing?

You just use the software and type a message to report any problems, or any features that you would like added.

What is involved in helping out with the project?

There are two broad categories of help: computer science, and business. You will see the options in the survey.

The survey is found here:

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1ptHBl2U2SZyF4zq721iisoXNvVv71iY3rVOEjm1g2Nw/edit](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1ptHBl2U2SZyF4zq721iisoXNvVv71iY3rVOEjm1g2Nw/edit)

Thanks,

# Thread: IRIS Settings - What are yours?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### jewishhacker — 2019-01-28T21:09:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/post-261608>

Ive been using IRIS for several months now, but sometimes the lack of colors makes buttons and different spreadsheets difficult to see. I just realized the greyscale option in advanced settings which solved that.

I figured there were probably some features / settings I havent explored or realized yet and curious what options/settings people use and feel best with IRIS?

I currently use the bluelight at 0% at all times, and now with the greyscale makes it easier to see things.
Brightness is at about 75%

### Anita — 2019-01-28T21:21:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/post-261614>

I've had Iris about a month and use the Reading setting during the daylight hours with blue light set to zero. I believe this is the best screen software and I used Lux for many years prior. I also have brightness set about 70%.

### Jaime T. — 2019-04-17T19:55:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/post-268297>

> [jewishhacker said:](/goto/post?id=261608)
>
> Ive been using IRIS for several months now, but sometimes the lack of colors makes buttons and different spreadsheets difficult to see. I just realized the greyscale option in advanced settings which solved that.
>
> I figured there were probably some features / settings I havent explored or realized yet and curious what options/settings people use and feel best with IRIS?
>
> I currently use the bluelight at 0% at all times, and now with the greyscale makes it easier to see things.
> Brightness is at about 75%

Hi, how did you adjust the greyscale on Iris?

### Katie Durham — 2019-04-17T20:15:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/post-268298>

I go into the blue light control and turn blue light and brightness all the way down except for the infrequent situation where I temporarily need to see much more detail than that allows. I still wear blue blocking glasses just in case.

I have been very pleased with IRIS' online support. They're good folks.

IRIS is on my home laptop. I can't turn volume far enough up for some of the podcasts or videos I like to listen to. So I hook the laptop to a tv via HDMI, which picks up the IRIS settings.

### Jaime T. — 2019-04-17T21:08:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/post-268300>

> IRIS is on my home laptop. I can't turn volume far enough up for some of the podcasts or videos I like to listen to. So I hook the laptop to a tv via HDMI, which picks up the IRIS settings.

Thank you Katie, yes that is what I am doing now. I was just curious how jewishhacker was adjusting greyscale since the red is a bit hard ot read at times.

### MichaelC — 2024-07-13T21:14:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iris-settings-what-are-yours.23003/post-337097>

Reviving this thread to see if anyone else has feedback on the best Iris settings.

# Thread: What my cats think of the Magnetico and other quantum stuff
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-my-cats-think-of-the-magnetico-and-other-quantum-stuff.23025/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Katie Durham — 2019-01-30T22:20:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-my-cats-think-of-the-magnetico-and-other-quantum-stuff.23025/post-261851>

I installed a 10 gauss Magnetico 2 weeks ago. I am sleeping better but sometimes it seems a little subtle. So I wanted someone else’s opinion, especially since I see a sleep doctor next week and his tests have been inconclusive as to whether I need a CPAP. (I’m going to show off my new Ra-Optics during that visit. Bet the doctor isn’t wearing anything!)

I live with two adult cats, TJ and Dora (brother and sister), in a single family home in the suburbs. I work often with animal communicators, all remotely. It’s just energy, after all, and even if cats don’t have as many mitochondria in their brains, mine are very energy aware, self aware, and articulate. It means I am in an unusual situation to ask them about the Magnetico as well as extensive other nnEMF changes I have made in the past several months. TJ sleeps with me every night. Dora currently sleeps in the livingroom because TJ does not want to share me at night.

Today TJ and Dora were asked about … The Magnetico. Whether my sleep quality has improved. Whether there have been positive changes in house energy in general. Why Dora asked for a purple blanket a year ago. And whether the unpleasant change of energy the cats experience upon coming back in the house after a backyard stroll with me is less physically uncomfortable than it used to be, especially for TJ. The following is an excerpt from the session. Hope you enjoy it!

TJ said that the magnets create an "energy wind." The energy in the room, and especially around the bed, started to move in a very different way when the magnets were added. They pull it gently in one direction, like a change in the wind, and he finds his own energy is easier to focus on and ground. The energies aren't scattered. It's very gentle, and quite pleasant. He sleeps soundly and his dreams have been unusually vivid and pleasant since they arrived.

He also notices that, once Mom falls asleep, her energy gets very settled, and he has not been aware of it rising back up to the surface and sinking again. Lately, before the magnets but even more since, she seems to stay sleeping in a more relaxed and peaceful place. Before, she would sleep, then her energy would come back toward the surface. Sometimes she would actually wake, but sometimes there would just be a "restless disturbance" that would then settle back into a deeper sleep. She seems, most of the time now, to sleep more fully and quietly. He feels this is a good thing.

TJ says the more settled sleeping seems to also be affecting the snoring. Mom's been sleeping more quietly. One night very recently she was a bit more restless. She snored a bit, but then settled back in after shifting her position a bit, and was quiet for the rest of the night.

Dora feels Mom's energy is more grounded when she gets up and starts moving around the house. It’s slight and very subtle, but her feeling is this is a process, this shift, and it will probably continue to be more beneficial. Dora’s main awareness of Mom's better sleeping is that she seems more rested during the day. Dora does sometimes make the rounds of the house, and peek in on Mom during the night periodically, and has noticed that Mom is usually resting quietly now at those times.

Dora is very aware that the energy of her purple blanket seems to draw positive vibrations toward her, and it gives her a sense of peace. She feels both connected to higher things, and more grounded to the earth, when she is lying on it. She hadn't thought about UV light, but now that Mom has mentioned it, she does think that some of the pleasant feeling she gets from the blanket is similar to when she is outside soaking up the sunshine on her walks.

TJ says that the differences between outside and inside are definitely not as pronounced. He's finding it more comfortable, especially the changes closer to the floor. It seems to have something to do with energy movement on his walking level as he comes inside, as if he is walking through a barrier of some sort. He no longer feels like he's swimming through jello. Dora says that it never really bothered her so much, but yes, she's finding the energy different and less of a shift from outside, too.

TJ then, when I was focusing on the question of whether there's more you can do, or areas of the house that still need improvement, asked about magnets. He said that the magnets in the bed have improved how the vibrations move. If Mom can put magnets in places where there's a lot of artificial energy, down by the floor, would they help to ground that energy toward the earth so it doesn't fly all about? He mostly notices this artificial energy in the kitchen, and by appliances, and near the computer stuff, etc. He wants to know if there is something that can sit on the floor and work like a magnet in those areas, since the magnet in the bed seems to be doing just what he has in mind for that area.

# Thread: Does the 'standard' CT, Leptin Rx, Max Sunlight help Hypertyroidism/Graves?

Hi All

I've searched the forum and Patreon and Dr. Jack's podcasts and so far I havent found Hyperthyroidism / Graves (AutoImm) mentioned. In Hyperthyroidism the body processes run too fast and hence low absorption of nutrients, rapid weight loss, rapid resting heart rate, tremors.... My thyroid antibodies
My story is in the Optimal Journal but I am wondering if anyone else has experience with Hyperthyroidism or Graves with Dr.Jack's protocols. I dont want to find out that things have become worse. I have a intuition feeling that the Leptin RX would reset my Leptin receptors so my body weight would stop falling - so I have started that a week ago. In Australia, my doctor doesnt want to get new labs done monthly but insists "just take your Carbimazole, lets see in 3 months".....and we cant order labs ourselves as far as I know.

December Labs - See my Optimal Journal for PDFs
for the "normal range" if your units of measurement are different:
TSH <0.01 uU/mL (too low)
Free T4 26H pmol/L (high)
Free T3 8.5H pmol/L (high)
Thyr PeroxAb 258H IU/ml (v high)
ThyroglobnAb 3 IU/ml (normal)

Thanks for all your help.

Peter in Oz.

### Peter Schmidt — 2019-02-06T03:00:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-the-standard-ct-leptin-rx-max-sunlight-help-hypertyroidism-graves.23038/post-262368>

Hi All
For example, I'm losing about 0.5kg each day but Im not sure whether it is my Graves or from the Leptin Protocol? I'm still in 90's kg so Im not as concerned as when I went down to 76kg a year ago from 105Kg...
Thanks to anyone responding.

# Thread: Saying Goodbye to the Pacific
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/saying-goodbye-to-the-pacific.23040/>
**Subforum:** Cold Thermogenesis
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Brett Jacques ND — 2019-02-01T22:29:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/saying-goodbye-to-the-pacific.23040/post-262074>

As the count down begins for my exodus from the Peoples Socialist Construct of Californication, I will sorely miss my CT in the Pacific. Yesterday I was 25 yards away from a large pod of feeding, breeching and probably mating dolphins, what a joy to see. I've experienced so much, seen so much, and lived much more because of it. I've been bitten, stung, slammed, flipped, tossed and enlightened by this body of water. I've frolicked in storms, rain and even after it snowed here once(some called it hail but I built 3 little snowmen with it so it's snow to me) It will probably be the only thing I will miss.
So how does one pass the time doing CT in a tub when there's no wild life to watch/avoid, waves to ride/avoid?

### PalmBeach1 — 2019-02-02T00:43:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/saying-goodbye-to-the-pacific.23040/post-262078>

Where are you moving to?

### caroline — 2019-02-02T05:42:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/saying-goodbye-to-the-pacific.23040/post-262106>

I used to listen to blogs and podcasts ....but I hated it. Now I only do ocean C/T....maybe not the best but pretty darn good - especially in the winter time!

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-02-07T18:49:15+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/saying-goodbye-to-the-pacific.23040/post-262503>

> [Brett Jacques ND said:](/goto/post?id=262074)
>
> As the count down begins for my exodus from the Peoples Socialist Construct of Californication, I will sorely miss my CT in the Pacific. Yesterday I was 25 yards away from a large pod of feeding, breeching and probably mating dolphins, what a joy to see. I've experienced so much, seen so much, and lived much more because of it. I've been bitten, stung, slammed, flipped, tossed and enlightened by this body of water. I've frolicked in storms, rain and even after it snowed here once(some called it hail but I built 3 little snowmen with it so it's snow to me) It will probably be the only thing I will miss.
> So how does one pass the time doing CT in a tub when there's no wild life to watch/avoid, waves to ride/avoid?

So many of us are going to sacrifice living in places we love to be in order to survive this unholy microwave assault on mind and body. Those who are wise and follow Dr Kruse are bound to be survivors no matter what future brings. Keep your eyes open, be of good cheer, and never fear.

### Christine_L — 2019-02-11T19:55:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/saying-goodbye-to-the-pacific.23040/post-262902>

There's plenty of wildlife away from the ocean too! Think of the different species of birds, bees, bunnies, hawks... There's a whole world out there that just differs a bit from place to place. I do CT in my tub at home. Nothing to look at except my bathroom and that works quite nicely for me. There's something good to be said for being by yourself with your thoughts.
